license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qp8dvrw
title: Postural stability, body weight distribution, and foot typology of sportsmen
author: Jitka Marencakova

steps_raw.instruction: Perform measuring process by following the Guidelines: 1) 30 s of narrow stance 2) 60 s of one-leg stance 3) 60 s of one-leg stance - the second leg
Register: 1) percentage of body weight distribution form narrow stance test. 2) total travelled way of COP during one-leg stance test for both legs.
Save footprints from one-leg stance test for both legs.
Use 2D analysis software for Chippaux-Smirak Index calculation from saved footprints following the Guidelines .
Repeat each of the test 3 times and let the participant rest for 60 s in a relaxed position after every test.
